arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Southampton – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: It’s top against bottom in the Premier League this afternoon as Liverpool welcome Southampton to Anfield. The league leaders earned a precious result in the Champions League during midweek as they beat Paris Saint-Germain 1-0 in the French capital. Cody Gakpo didn’t train on Thursday and is unlikely to be risked ahead of the second […] The post Liverpool vs Southampton – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: When Arne Slot's touchline ban ends after Liverpool red card suspension
arts.sum: Liverpool host Southampton at Anfield on Saturday afternoon with Arne Slot serving the final match of his touchline suspension dished out after the game against Everton

arts.ttl: PSG players 'shocked by how POOR Liverpool were' despite 1-0 loss - with French champions 'convinced two other Champions League clubs are more complete than Arne Slot's side'
arts.sum: PSG players were reportedly left shocked by the poor level of Liverpool 's performance in the first leg of their Champions League round of 16 tie on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid: FIFA opens SPECIAL transfer window as new bid launched for Liverpool defender
arts.sum: Liverpool could land a surprising transfer windfall from Trent Alexander-Arnold as Real Madrid aim to secure the services of the England full-back early. As such, Real Madrid are still in position to spend on Alexander-Arnold, whose contract with Liverpool does not expire until 30 June – midway through the new tournament.
